    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class applicationMain.FoundationsMain
    Title: FoundationsMain main method that starts up JavaFX
    main(String[]) - Static method in class testCases.AutomatedPostTest
    Executes a suite of automated tests to verify business rules for creating and reading posts and replies.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class testCases.ManualPostTest
    Entry point for the manual test driver.
    ManualPostTest - Class in testCases
    Provides a manual verification driver for the Post system.
    ManualPostTest() - Constructor for class testCases.ManualPostTest
     
    markDeleted() - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Marks the post as deleted.
    markPostDeleted(int, String) - Method in class database.Database
    Method: markPostDeleted(int id)
    MAX_BODY_LENGTH - Static variable in class entityClasses.Post
    Max allowed length for post bodies
    MAX_BODY_LENGTH - Static variable in class entityClasses.Reply
    The maximum reply body length.
    MAX_TITLE_LENGTH - Static variable in class entityClasses.Post
    Max allowed length for post titles
